title: Business Writing and Professional Communication
whatILearned: I learned that professional communication should be clear, concise, polite, and audience-focused. PPW helped me understand how formal emails, reports, and workplace messages should be structured.
howItChangedMe: Before this module, I mainly focused on delivering information. Now I understand that tone, structure, clarity, and professionalism are equally important.
howIWillApply: I will apply these skills when writing workplace emails, preparing project documentation, communicating with teams, and creating professional reports.

title: Presentation Skills
whatILearned: I learned that an effective presentation needs a clear beginning, body, and conclusion, supported by simple visual aids and confident delivery.
howItChangedMe: I now understand that presentation success depends not only on content but also on eye contact, posture, voice, timing, and audience engagement.
howIWillApply: I will use these skills for academic presentations, project demonstrations, viva sessions, and workplace meetings.

title: Interview Preparation
whatILearned: I learned how to prepare for interviews by understanding common questions, using the STAR method, presenting my strengths, and maintaining professional body language.
howItChangedMe: I became more confident in explaining my experience, projects, technical skills, and career goals in a structured way.
howIWillApply: I will use these techniques when applying for Associate Software Engineer or Full-Stack Developer positions.

title: Workplace Etiquette and Communication
whatILearned: I learned the importance of professional behaviour, respectful communication, active listening, and proper telephone etiquette in the workplace.
howItChangedMe: This helped me understand that technical knowledge alone is not enough. Professional conduct and communication are essential in real work environments.
howIWillApply: I will apply these skills when communicating with colleagues, supervisors, clients, and team members.

title: Career Readiness and Personal Branding
whatILearned: I learned how a CV, LinkedIn profile, GitHub profile, portfolio website, and certificates contribute to professional identity.
howItChangedMe: I started viewing my academic projects, work experience, and research work as part of one personal brand.
howIWillApply: I will maintain an updated portfolio, improve my GitHub documentation, and continue building a strong professional presence.
